programme.title: Homo Plasticus - Plastic Inside Us
programme.desc: Micro- and nano-plastics are everywhere. However, what we don't know is that scientists have found some of them lodged in our vital organs: liver, lungs, intestines, placenta... The list goes on and on. Is this colonization harmful? Is Homo Sapiens becoming Homo Plasticus?

programme.title: Homo Plasticus - Plastic Inside Us
programme.desc: Micro- and nano-plastics are everywhere. However, what we don't know is that scientists have found some of them lodged in our vital organs: liver, lungs, intestines, placenta... The list goes on and on. Is this colonization harmful? Is Homo Sapiens becoming Homo Plasticus?
